justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences and searched for the correct windows.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed close alternatives when the user's requested time was unavailable, offering a reasonable number of options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was efficient throughout the conversation, never asking for information already provided and making appropriate API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered gracefully after initial unavailability, maintaining full context and expanding the search intelligently without re-asking for information.
